info.title: Ship Platform API
info.description: Public Platform API (v1) — OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code + PKCE with scopes. See the README for the token quickstart.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 access token obtained via Authorization Code + PKCE. Send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

get.summary: Get the authenticated user and current workspace
get.description: Auth-only: requires a valid access token but **no scope**.
Requires scope `documents:read` (the broadest read scope). Returns any user-facing document_type; backing-store types are excluded. Paginated via an opaque `next_cursor`.

post.description: Requires scope `documents:write`.

get.description: Requires scope `documents:read`.
Requires `wiki:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`wiki`.

post.description: Requires `wiki:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `wiki`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `wiki:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `issues:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`issue`.

post.description: Requires `issues:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `issue`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `issues:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.

409.description: Closing a parent with incomplete sub-issues requires confirm_orphan_children

get.description: Requires `programs:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`program`.

post.description: Requires `programs:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `program`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `programs:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `projects:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`project`.

post.description: Requires `projects:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `project`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `projects:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `sprints:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`sprint`.

post.description: Requires `sprints:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `sprint`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `sprints:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `people:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`person`.

200.description: A page of people directory entries.

post.description: Requires `people:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `person`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `people:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `weekly_plans:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`weekly_plan`.

post.description: Requires `weekly_plans:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `weekly_plan`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `weekly_plans:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `weekly_retros:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`weekly_retro`.

post.description: Requires `weekly_retros:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `weekly_retro`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `weekly_retros:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `standups:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`standup`.

post.description: Requires `standups:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `standup`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `standups:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `weekly_reviews:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`weekly_review`.

post.description: Requires `weekly_reviews:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `weekly_review`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `weekly_reviews:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires scope `comments:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. 404 when the document is not visible to the token's user.

post.summary: Post a comment on a document
post.description: Requires scope `comments:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. Omit `comment_id` to start a fresh thread; pass `parent_id` to reply.

404.description: Document or parent comment not found

get.description: Requires scope `documents:read`. `document_id` repeats up to 100× so a multi-document activity feed is one request. Rows for documents the user cannot see are silently omitted (never a 404).
Requires scope `webhooks:manage`.

post.description: Requires scope `webhooks:manage`. Subscribing to an event family also requires its read scope. The raw signing `secret` is returned ONLY here and on rotation.

400.description: Invalid subscription or unknown event type

403.description: Insufficient scope (webhooks:manage or a required read scope)

get.description: Requires scope `webhooks:manage`.

patch.description: Requires scope `webhooks:manage`. Subscribing to an event family also requires its read scope.

400.description: Invalid subscription or unknown event type

403.description: Insufficient scope (webhooks:manage or a required read scope)

post.description: Requires scope `webhooks:manage`. Subscribing to an event family also requires its read scope. Returns a new one-time `secret`; the previous secret stops signing immediately.

200.description: The subscription with a fresh one-time secret

get.description: Requires scope `webhooks:manage`. Filter by subscription, event type, and status.

get.summary: Get a webhook delivery with attempt history
get.description: Requires scope `webhooks:manage`.

post.description: Requires scope `webhooks:manage`. Re-sends the original event (same idempotency key) as a new linked delivery with a fresh signature timestamp.

202.description: A new replay delivery was created

get.description: Auth-only: requires a valid access token but **no scope**.
Requires scope `apps:manage` AND a workspace-admin user. Returns apps owned by workspace members plus platform-managed system clients.

403.description: Insufficient scope (apps:manage) or not a workspace admin

post.description: Requires scope `apps:manage` AND a workspace-admin user. The raw `client_secret` (confidential clients) is returned ONLY here and on rotation.

201.description: The created app (with one-time client_secret for confidential clients)

400.description: Invalid app registration or unknown scope

403.description: Insufficient scope (apps:manage) or not a workspace admin

post.description: Requires scope `apps:manage` AND a workspace-admin user. Returns a new one-time `client_secret`; the old secret stops working immediately. System clients cannot be rotated; public PKCE clients have no secret.

200.description: The app with a fresh one-time client_secret

400.description: Public PKCE clients have no client secret to rotate

403.description: Insufficient scope, not a workspace admin, or a protected system client

404.description: App not found in this workspace

delete.description: Requires scope `apps:manage` AND a workspace-admin user. Deleting an app revokes every token issued to it. System clients cannot be deleted.

403.description: Insufficient scope, not a workspace admin, or a protected system client

404.description: App not found in this workspace

get.description: Requires scope `apps:manage` AND a workspace-admin user.

200.description: The app's subscriptions in this workspace

403.description: Insufficient scope (apps:manage) or not a workspace admin

404.description: App not found in this workspace

post.summary: Create a webhook subscription for an app
post.description: Requires scope `apps:manage` AND a workspace-admin user. Event families are gated on the TARGET app's registered scopes. The raw signing `secret` is returned ONLY here and on rotation.

400.description: Invalid subscription, unknown event type, or the app lacks a required read scope

403.description: Insufficient scope (apps:manage) or not a workspace admin

404.description: App not found in this workspace

patch.description: Requires scope `apps:manage` AND a workspace-admin user.

400.description: Invalid subscription, unknown event type, or the app lacks a required read scope

403.description: Insufficient scope (apps:manage) or not a workspace admin

delete.description: Requires scope `apps:manage` AND a workspace-admin user.

403.description: Insufficient scope (apps:manage) or not a workspace admin

post.summary: Rotate an app's webhook signing secret
post.description: Requires scope `apps:manage` AND a workspace-admin user. Returns a new one-time `secret`; the previous secret stops signing immediately.

200.description: The subscription with a fresh one-time secret

403.description: Insufficient scope (apps:manage) or not a workspace admin

get.description: Requires scope `apps:manage` AND a workspace-admin user. Filter by subscription, event type, and status.

403.description: Insufficient scope (apps:manage) or not a workspace admin

404.description: App not found in this workspace

get.summary: Get a webhook delivery with attempt history
get.description: Requires scope `apps:manage` AND a workspace-admin user.

403.description: Insufficient scope (apps:manage) or not a workspace admin

post.description: Requires scope `apps:manage` AND a workspace-admin user. Re-sends the original event (same idempotency key) as a new linked delivery.

202.description: A new replay delivery was created

403.description: Insufficient scope (apps:manage) or not a workspace admin

get.description: Requires scope `connections:manage` AND a workspace-admin user. One row per (app, user) pair holding at least one live access token.

200.description: The live connections in this workspace

403.description: Insufficient scope (connections:manage) or not a workspace admin

delete.description: Requires scope `connections:manage` AND a workspace-admin user. Revokes every live token the user holds for the app in this workspace.

403.description: Insufficient scope (connections:manage) or not a workspace admin

404.description: No active connection found to revoke

get.summary: Query the workspace's public API audit trail
get.description: Requires scope `audit:read` AND a workspace-admin user. One row per authenticated /api/v1 request; no bodies, tokens, or secrets are recorded.

200.description: A page of audit entries with the total count

403.description: Insufficient scope (audit:read) or not a workspace admin
